title: Soot Unofficial Extended Life
description: A fork of a dwarven-themed addon.
body:
Welcome to our fork of the Dwarven-themed Magic Addon [Soot](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/soot). [Soot](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/soot) is an addon for [Embers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/embers-rekindled), to provide some improvements and additions to Embers content, while trying not to offset the feel of [Embers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/embers-rekindled) too much. We decided to make our own fork of it, because fixing all errors with our [Embers fork](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/embers-extended-life) via mixins would have been a nightmare. This way we can develop both forks closely together and further streamline our development process.

 

This mod will only ever support version 1.12.2.

 

If you play with [Embers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/embers) or [Embers Rekindled](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/embers-rekindled) use the original [Soot](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/soot) instead.

 

**Changes to [Soot](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/soot) v1.10**

*   this now depends on [Embers Unofficial Extended Life](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/embers-extended-life)
*   revamped the config system to allow it to be edited in-game
*   fix a bug with some of the CraftTweaker methods not working at all
*   switched to **[RetroFuturaGradle](https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/RetroFuturaGradle)**
*   native GroovyScript support

 

**Credits:**

*   [BordListian](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/bordlistian) - Original Author of Soot

[**![](https://files.readme.io/f10e57c-Diamond_Shaped3.png)**](https://www.akliz.net/enderman)

This mod is published under MIT. (Same license [BordListian](https://github.com/DaedalusGame) originally choose.)
